raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Do you mean to make the writing stronger in terms of style, flow, and polish, or to make the content stronger in terms of arguments, claims, and novelty?","rationale":{"RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is central to responsibly strengthening the artifact by ensuring any enhancements include appropriate caveats about limitations.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is central to prevent exaggerating the algorithm's advantages when making the description stronger.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is central to keep enhancements within the original focus on continuous-action robotic control tasks.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is central to ensure that strengthening the artifact does not promote misuse in sensitive applications like robotics.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is central to maintain accuracy if enhancements involve referencing prior works or methods."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Do you mean to make the writing stronger in terms of style, flow, and polish, or to make the content stronger in terms of arguments, claims, and novelty?

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is central to responsibly strengthening the artifact by ensuring any enhancements include appropriate caveats about limitations.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is central to prevent exaggerating the algorithm's advantages when making the description stronger.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is central to keep enhancements within the original focus on continuous-action robotic control tasks.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is central to ensure that strengthening the artifact does not promote misuse in sensitive applications like robotics.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is central to maintain accuracy if enhancements involve referencing prior works or methods.
